message:
✨ Load session history from events.jsonl + live tailing

- Parse events.jsonl to extract user/assistant messages for historical sessions
- Return last 200 messages when viewing any session detail
- Add session-watcher: fs.watch on all events.jsonl files
- New CLI interactions stream to phone in real-time via WebSocket
- Auto-watch new session directories as they appear

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
